description: Gentle float camera path preset -- very slow, subtle movement in all three axes. Almost subliminal. Good for ambient scenes. Defines position(t), lookAt(t) with small-amplitude multi-axis drift, easing defaults, compatible geometries (most geometries), and oversizing requirements (minimal due to small motion range).
notes: Tier 2 camera path. Universal ambient preset -- compatible with most geometries. Spec complete: incommensurate sinusoidal oscillations with fade envelopes, speed scales position only, easing modulates position envelope only, lookAt drift independent of all author params.
